CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Continued To Mar-24-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Enter Judgment Against Defendant
Off Calendar Nov-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2006-3'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Enter Judgment Against Defendant.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)
